case_title: EPIC SIGHTSEEING, LLC VS. SOUTHERN TIRE MART, LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-06-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EPIC SIGHTSEEING, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY BRADLEY PRICKETT (VICE PRESIDENT OF OPERATIONS AND ADMINISTRATION). DEFENDANT SOUTHERN TIRE MART, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF MUST HAVE DEFENDANT SERVED WITH THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WITH THE NEW COURT DATE AND TIME REFLECTED ON THE CLAIM. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARGARET WU; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $25. SERVED OCT-09-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHERN TIRE MART, LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EPIC SIGHTSEEING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHERN TIRE MART, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) BRADLEY PRICKETT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF EPIC SIGHTSEEING, LLC
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF EPIC SIGHTSEEING, LLC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SOUTHERN TIRE MART, LLC. JUDGE PRO TEM:LAUREN KRAMER-SUJEETH; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. & D. CARTER. MATTER NOT REPORTED.(D506)
